name: Serverworks Co.,Ltd.
summary: Serverworks Co.,Ltd. operates as a cloud integrator that provides integration business and service specialized for Amazon Web Services (AWS). The company is involved in planning, development, and operation of systems utilizing cloud computing; and AWS migration support and re-sale services. It also offers Cloud Automator, a service that automates AWS operations. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
